name: pagination-bar
title: Pagination Bar
description: Single-line page indicator with prev/next chevrons, a 1-indexed 'page of total' label, and an optional '(N items)' suffix. WithPerPage + WithTotalItems derive the page count and visible item range automatically.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Construct with New().WithTotal(n).WithPage(i). Left/h moves to the previous page, Right/l to the next, Home/g jumps to the first, End/G to the last. Page() is 0-indexed; PageNumber() returns the 1-indexed value for display. PageChangedMsg fires only when the page actually changes, so consumers can listen without filtering no-ops. WithPerPage(k) + WithTotalItems(n) derive Total() automatically and let VisibleRange() return the [start, end) item indices for the current page. WithWrap(true) wraps motion at both ends; the default is no wrap.
